name: gentle-cloning
description: GENtle Cloning is ClawBio's specialist for deterministic, parser-validated DNA design and genome-context analysis. It executes real GENtle commands and workflows on local data rather than free-form LLM advice, and returns auditable bundles. The skill is the in-application action layer for cloning: ClawBio chat remains the orchestration and conversation layer, while this skill carries out the cloning-side work under engine-validated bounds, with the GUI as the inspection and review surface. Capabilities span (1) translation of cohort or patient-data observations, differential-expression hits, splice-variant observations, perturbation requests, or direct DNA fragment requests into sequence-grounded mechanistic follow-up; (2) installed-runtime and resource-readiness checks plus stateless DNA-fragment inspection (restriction sites, TFBS hits) for fast read-only checks; (3) reusable local reference assets including prepared Ensembl caches and BLAST-ready indices that other bioinformatics tools can also reuse; (4) transcript-native protein-residue-to-genomic-codon mapping; (5) RNA secondary-structure readiness via ViennaRNA/RNAfold and rnapkin executable resources; (6) the full shared PCR/qPCR command family for ClawBio (Primer3 preflight, seed helpers, PCR primer design, probe-based qPCR/TaqMan design, transcript-derived cDNA PCR/qPCR assay testing, report listing/inspection/export, PCR protocol cartoons, restriction-cloning PCR handoffs, and assistant-ready wet-lab cloning instruction exports); (7) transcript qPCR panel tables with shared reverse/probe components and characteristic forward primers; (8) transcript-native protein-gel / protein 2D-gel / protease-digest figures for bundled example loci, parameterized Ensembl genes, and Ensembl gene panels; and (9) bench-side handoff outputs (arrangements, rack placements, label sheets, fabrication templates) that connect digital planning to physical sample handling within the same replayable workflow. Each successful run produces a versioned ClawBio bundle with report.md, result.json, and reproducibility files, plus a PNG-first preferred-artifacts set for figure-producing runs. Operation-level provenance is tracked in a shared lineage graph so every derived sequence is traceable to its source inputs and the operations that produced it. Ships a ClawBio skill-intent descriptor for runner-neutral chat routing.
dependencies: Configured GENTLE_CLI_CMD (for example gentle_local_checkout_cli.sh or gentle_apptainer_cli.sh)
ViennaRNA RNAfold on PATH or explicit GENTLE_RNAFOLD_BIN for RNA secondary-structure folding
rnapkin on PATH or explicit GENTLE_RNAPKIN_BIN for RNA secondary-structure rendering
